description: CEDS (Common Education Data Standards) Ontology v14 — education data element definitions, domain classes, option sets, and relationships
_note: No startup needed. Docker --restart unless-stopped keeps containers running. First-time init: indexOntology14ForMilo -start --assetsDir=./assets

definition.name: ceds14_search
definition.description: Search the CEDS v14 education data standards ontology using hybrid BM25 + semantic search. Finds classes, properties (data elements), option sets (enumerations), and their relationships. Results include neighborhood context (a class shows its properties, a property shows its parent classes and option sets). Use for any question about education data standards, CEDS element definitions, data types, or valid value sets.

query.description: Search query — CEDS element name, ID (e.g., P600559), concept, or natural language question about education data elements

definition.name: ceds14_explore
definition.description: Deep dive into a CEDS v14 class. Shows the class definition, all its properties with data types, parent/child relationships, and connected option sets. Use when you know the class name and want full detail.

name.description: CEDS class name (e.g., 'Membership', 'Enrollment') or CEDS ID (e.g., 'C200257')

definition.name: ceds14_option_set
definition.description: List all allowed values in a CEDS v14 option set (enumeration). Use when you need to know what valid values exist for a particular coded field.

name.description: Option set name (e.g., 'Sex', 'Grade Level') or CEDS ID

definition.name: ceds14_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute a raw Cypher query against the CEDS v14 ontology graph. The graph contains :CedsClass, :CedsProperty, :CedsOptionSet, :CedsOptionValue nodes (all with :CEDS label) connected by :HAS_PROPERTY, :HAS_OPTION_SET, :HAS_VALUE, :SUBCLASS_OF, :PART_OF relationships. Properties have cedsId, label, description, notation, and type-specific fields.

query.description: A Cypher query to execute against the CEDS v14 Neo4j graph
